items.reasoning: Sustain through Last Word damage proc and Crypt Swarm harass.
Recovery after Arcane Curse + Spirit Siphon drains HP over time.
+3 INT counters Silencer INT steal; every point of INT stolen hurts Invoker.
Cheap +2 stats; builds into Wand against spell-heavy lane.
INT efficiency to offset Silencer's permanent INT steal. Every kill or assist steals 2 INT.
Movement speed to position outside Last Word trigger range.
Silencer Curse + Last Word + DP Swarm = 5+ charges per minute.
Self-cyclone dispels Global Silence and Silence. +2.5 mana regen sustains Invoke combos.
Prevents both silences during teamfight combo execution. Invoker needs 3-4 seconds of uninterrupted casting.
3.5s hex locks DP before Exorcism spirits spawn. Massive INT boost offsets steal.
Cataclysm double Sun Strike melts teamfights. Additional Invoke spells available.
25% CDR on Invoke and all spells. Tornado + EMP + Meteor combo every 20s.
Dispels silence on use; illusions proc Cold Snap and add confusion.
Reflects Last Word cast back on Silencer; dispels silence on ally.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Eul's is the critical first item -- dispels both silences and enables Tornado combos. BKB second for teamfight execution. Invoker outscales both heroes hard with 10+ spells at level 25, but only if he can cast. Stack INT items to offset Silencer's permanent steal and maintain mana pool.
